issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

content.text: synced this conversation thread with the Slack thread
. Replies in synced threads will automatically update across both Slack and Jira.
The buttons are being disabled due to a POD loading performance issue. They remain disabled until all existing PODs are loaded in this object, in order to prevent incorrect request submissions.
Improving the performance of the “Request for Disconnection” process should also resolve this issue. Once PODs are loaded faster, the buttons will become available more quickly as well.
We are already working on performance improvement →
Should we close this bug and wait till performance improvement?
I prefer to test it after the fix of 2529. So, please don't close it.

status.description: This status is managed internally by Jira Software
status.name: Ready for testing
